title: RINSE Interpretation Record
description: A derived, reversible interpretation record produced by RINSE from immutable source traces.

id.description: Stable identifier for this derived interpretation record.

source_trace_ids.description: Back-references to immutable source trace ids. RINSE must not mutate those traces.

emotions.description: Coarse affective labels detected from the trace text.

signals.description: Salient structural or behavioral signals detected by the pipeline.

causal_links.description: Cause/effect hints extracted from the source trace. These are provisional interpretations, not source truth.

clarity.description: Support score for the interpretation based on available signals.

produced_at.description: Timestamp when RINSE produced the interpretation record.
